home.title: telepace — Voice-native, Agent-first user research infrastructure
home.description: telepace runs voice interviews with your users on autopilot — and hands the structured insights back to your agent, so it can act on them.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Simple pricing that scales with your research — free tier, Pro, and Team. No card required to start.

mcp.description: The telepace MCP server: stateful research tools for any MCP-compatible agent.

productAgent.title: Agent
productAgent.description: Designer, Interviewer, Analyst, Coordinator — four agents that run research end to end.

productVoice.title: Voice
productVoice.description: Voice interviews in the browser, by phone, or on a hotline — natural turn-taking, ten languages.

careers.title: Careers
careers.description: Join the team building voice-native user research for the agent era.
